calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For Atty 'S Fees Following Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Plaintiff Herlinda Hernandez present (415-467-7413) opposing party.
Atty. Nicholas B. Waranoff of Allen, Matkins Leck, Gamble, Mallory & Natsis LLP (415-837-1515) appearing for defendant Onewest Bank moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's Motion For Attorney's Fees Following Special Motion To Strike is Granted attorney's fees as requested totaling $11,730.80. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn To Reconsider Under Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Herlinda Hernandez (415-467-7413) plaintiff and moving party in pro per/ Keith D. Yandell (415-273-7444) of Allen Matkins for Onewest Bank, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF HERLINDA HERNANDEZ's Motion To Reconsider Under Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A) is denied. Plaintiff failed to establish burden re 1008. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Keith Yandell (415-273-7444) of Allen Matkins for Onewest Bank, defendant moving party / Herlinda Hernandez (415-467-7413) plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Following discussion with the court - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED - causes of action notice sufficiently plead. Mr. Yandell to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Keith Yandell (415-273-7444) of Allen Matkins for Onewest Bank, defendant moving party / Herlinda Hernandez (415-467-7413) plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Following discussion with the court - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted no opposition (due may 18, 2012). Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
